purpose: Shared cross-language fixture for dependency-free local content-addressed blob store semantics. Preview runtimes must support stable JSON-compatible put/get refs so evidence artifacts can be externalized from the state store.

required_scenarios.name: blob_roundtrip_json_value
required_scenarios.description: A JSON-compatible value written to the local blob store can be read back through its blob:// ref.

required_scenarios.name: blob_content_address_is_stable
required_scenarios.description: Writing the same JSON-compatible value twice returns the same digest and ref without duplicating logical content.

required_scenarios.name: blob_bad_ref_is_rejected
required_scenarios.description: Unsupported refs are rejected instead of being interpreted as local filesystem paths.

preview_status: implemented by Go, TypeScript, and Rust preview runtimes as local blob store parity; production S3/MinIO adapter parity remains separate
